    def eligible_for_childcare_assistance(self) -> bool:
        """Determine eligibility based on relevant financial and family factors."""
        # Eligibility based on household income relative to family size
        income_per_person = self.household_income / (self.number_of_children + 1)
        
        # Eligible if income per person is below threshold
        return income_per_person < 15000
